**Bed Assembly:** Center the King frame on the primary wall; verify 30" clearance on both sides for nightstands.

**Den:** Work desk staged with a clean laptop/notebook to show "Work from Home" utility.
**Patio (468"):** Fire pit in "social" arrangement; string lights active for dusk shots.
